# Addendum B - Debt-to-Income Eligibility Policy

## Rule
DTI <= 0.36 is the standard affordability threshold.

## Classification
- DTI <= 0.30: preferred
- 0.30 < DTI <= 0.36: standard approval eligible
- 0.36 < DTI <= 0.43: escalation required
- DTI > 0.43: high-risk review

## Adverse-action mapping
- AA02: Debt-to-income ratio exceeds standard eligibility threshold
